reviews.comment:
Impecable y muy completa estacion de servicios como es habitual en el ACA.

(Translated by Google)
Impeccable and very complete service station as is usual at ACA.

reviews.comment:
Estación de servicio muy completa, con carga de combustible y amplia venta en el  autoservicio, comida, golosinas, bebidas, etc.

(Translated by Google)
A very complete service station, with fuel and a wide selection of self-service products, food, sweets, drinks, etc.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1981887218224238304/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNjdHBHbE5REAE

reviews.comment:
Playeros serviciales, pero no lavan vidrios ni ofrecen revisar líquidos, tampoco hay tachos de agua a mano, los baños malos y no disponibles, el drugstore  cumple, la ubicación en el medio del bolsón buenisima, el aire funciona.

(Translated by Google)
Helpful beachgoers, but they don't wash windows or offer to check liquids, there are no water bins on hand, the bathrooms are bad and unavailable, the drugstore is adequate, the location in the middle of the area is great, the air conditioning works.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1981887218224238304/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzaWFqTkdnEAE
